name: m365-attachment-reader-mcp-local
description: Read and parse Outlook email attachments locally inside Claude Desktop using Microsoft Graph.
long_description: A local single-user MCP server for Claude Desktop that authenticates to Microsoft 365 using device code flow, lists Outlook messages and attachments, and parses attachment content including OCR-scanned PDFs, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, images, archives, and Outlook MSG files.

m365_client_id.title: Microsoft Entra App Client ID
m365_client_id.description: Application (client) ID from your Microsoft Entra app registration.

m365_tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
m365_tenant_id.description: Optional Microsoft Entra tenant ID. Use common for most personal or multi-tenant setups.

m365_auto_open_browser.title: Auto-open browser
m365_auto_open_browser.description: If enabled, begin_auth will try to open the Microsoft login page automatically.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check whether the local Outlook attachment MCP server is running.

tools.name: begin_auth
tools.description: Start Microsoft 365 device-code login for the local MCP server.

tools.name: auth_status
tools.description: Check whether Microsoft 365 login has completed.

tools.name: list_recent_messages
tools.description: List recent Outlook emails and whether they have attachments.

tools.name: list_email_attachments
tools.description: List attachments for a specific Outlook email.

tools.name: read_email_attachment
tools.description: Download and parse an Outlook attachment, including OCR and image-based formats.
